query:
SELECT cobertizo_id, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as ids
FROM paradas 
GROUP BY cobertizo_id 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4MNpKPTYaa3AiSj.root --database NB4DzLv3DwSWij5HcQ7rQi --execute SELECT cobertizo_id, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as ids
FROM paradas

HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
